◎简　　介  

　　Krister, a husband and a father, wakes up bloodied and distressed in what appear to be unfamiliar surroundings. Deeply affected by his experience he tries to regain some normality by setting about his daily routine, but his initial distractedness and sarcasm soon give way to more menacing, erratic and brutal behaviour. Unable to find any peace in the banalities of the quotidian...
